source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 中方对澳大利亚进口牛肉加征55%关税
topics.official_english: China Imposes 55% Tariff on Australian Beef Imports
topics.why_hot: Trade tensions escalate as China slaps a steep tariff on Australian beef, impacting global trade dynamics.
topics.share_angle: Explain the reasons behind the tariff and its implications for consumers and international relations.

topics.chinese_topic: 日本宣布：签证费涨到5倍
topics.official_english: Japan Announces Fivefold Increase in Visa Fees
topics.why_hot: Japan's visa fee hike affects millions of travelers, sparking discussions on travel costs and bilateral relations.
topics.share_angle: Break down the new visa fees and what they mean for tourists, students, and business travelers.

topics.chinese_topic: 在太空健身是什么体验
topics.official_english: What Is It Like to Exercise in Space?
topics.why_hot: Space exploration fascinates the public; insights into astronauts' fitness routines are both educational and inspiring.
topics.share_angle: Describe the unique challenges and equipment used for exercising in microgravity.

topics.chinese_topic: 套餐杀熟引热议 三大运营商为何沉默
topics.official_english: Price Discrimination in Mobile Plans Sparks Outrage; Why Are Major Carriers Silent?
topics.why_hot: Consumers accuse telecom giants of charging loyal customers more, raising concerns about fairness and regulation.
topics.share_angle: Explain the concept of 'price discrimination' and how it affects consumers, plus the regulatory landscape.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国在为台岛以东海域国土规划做准备
topics.official_english: China Prepares Territorial Planning for Waters East of Taiwan
topics.why_hot: Territorial planning in sensitive waters signals strategic moves, drawing international attention.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the geopolitical context and what this planning entails for regional stability.

topics.chinese_topic: 春秋航空日本飞机在哈尔滨机场重着陆
topics.official_english: Spring Airlines Japan Flight Makes Hard Landing at Harbin Airport
topics.why_hot: Aviation incidents raise safety concerns; passengers and crew details are closely watched.
topics.share_angle: Report on the incident, safety protocols, and investigation updates.

topics.chinese_topic: 伊朗足协正式投诉美国
topics.official_english: Iran Football Federation Formally Complains to US
topics.why_hot: Sports and politics intersect as Iran challenges US actions, possibly related to World Cup or sanctions.
topics.share_angle: Explain the context of the complaint and its potential impact on international sports diplomacy.

topics.chinese_topic: 喝雄黄酒杀菌？这些端午谣言别信
topics.official_english: Drinking Realgar Wine to Kill Germs? Don't Fall for These Dragon Boat Festival Myths
topics.why_hot: During Dragon Boat Festival, health myths circulate; debunking them protects public health.
topics.share_angle: Fact-check common Dragon Boat Festival health claims and provide science-based advice.
